reviews.comment:
Los baños un asco. Por más que sea Finde largo, hay que vaciar los tachos de papel e higienizar,  y revisar si la descarga funciona

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are disgusting. Even though it's a long weekend, you have to empty the toilet paper bins and clean them, and check if the toilet flushes.
